mapper.sql: id, project_id, task_id, name, category, file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, file_extension, version, parent_id, description, uploaded_by, status, download_count, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_document ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sys_document WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sys_document WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sys_document WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sys_document WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND category = #{category} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sys_document WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sys_document WHERE report_id = #{reportId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_document (id, project_id, task_id, name, category, file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, file_extension, version, parent_id, report_id, description, uploaded_by, status, download_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{projectId}, #{taskId}, #{name}, #{category}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, #{fileExtension}, #{version}, #{parentId}, #{reportId}, #{description}, #{uploadedBy}, #{status}, #{downloadCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_document WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND status = 'active'
